name: 💡 Feature request

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

<details>
<summary><b>📋 Example</b></summary>

> I'm always frustrated when [...]

</details>

---

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

<details>
<summary><b>💭 Example</b></summary>

> It would be great if the library could [...]

</details>

---

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

<details>
<summary><b>🔄 Example</b></summary>

> I've tried to work around this by [...], but it's not ideal because [...]

</details>

---

**Use case / Impact**

- **Who would benefit:** [e.g. All users, Users with specific setup, etc.]
- **How often:** [e.g. Every time I..., Once per project setup]

---

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

---

<sub>💙 Thanks for helping improve this library!</sub>
